TMC-first travel platform

The operating layer your TMC has been missing.

Cinturon360 replaces legacy back-office complexity with modern governance, automation, and finance-grade reporting — without forcing you to change how you book.

Works alongside GDS, NDC, direct suppliers, and your existing TMC workflows. No rip-and-replace.

Built for TMCs Join Waitlist

Works with the travel ecosystem you already use

Platform capabilities

Governance, automation, and visibility — built as one system

Not three bolt-on modules. A single platform where policy, workflow automation, and reporting share the same data model — so what gets approved is what gets reported.

🛡️
Governance

Policy and Approval Workflows

Route bookings to the right approvers before spend is committed. Apply rules by entity, team, traveller, cost centre, destination, supplier, fare cap, or exception path — and maintain a full defensible audit trail.

  • Pre-trip approvals
  • Cost-centre routing
  • Out-of-policy exception handling
  • Full audit trail
Learn More
⚙️
Automation

TMC Workflows Without the Manual Work

Replace repetitive back-office processes with automated workflows. From client onboarding to booking intake and mid-office operations — Cinturon360 runs the process so your team doesn't have to.

  • Client onboarding automation
  • Booking intake and processing
  • Mid-office workflow engine
  • Configurable rule-based routing
See TMC Operations
📊
Reporting

Finance-Grade Reporting and Visibility

Give travel, finance, procurement, and leadership teams a real-time picture of spend, compliance, exceptions, and operational activity — ready for export, audit, or board review.

  • Real-time spend visibility
  • Compliance and exception reporting
  • CFO-ready data exports
  • Multi-entity consolidation
See Reporting
Who we serve

One platform, every tier of managed travel

TMCs run on Cinturon360. Their corporate, government, and leisure clients benefit from it.

🏢

Travel Management Companies

The primary audience for Cinturon360. Replace Tramada and legacy mid-office tools with a modern platform built around how TMCs actually operate — client management, automation, integrations, and reporting at scale.

Tramada replacement Client management Automation
Explore
💼

Corporate Travel Programs

For CFOs, travel managers, and procurement teams who need pre-trip approvals, policy enforcement, and finance-grade spend visibility — without changing the way they book.

Pre-trip approvals Spend visibility Compliance
Explore
🏛️

Government & Controlled Environments

Structured governance, audit-grade records, and defensible approval workflows for travel programs operating under strict compliance and accountability requirements.

Audit trail Defensible records Strict governance
Explore
✈️

Leisure & High-Net-Worth Travel

Precision oversight for premium leisure programs and HNW personal travel. Policy, approvals, and visibility tools for advisors managing clients who expect discretion and quality.

Premium programs Advisor tools HNW clients
Explore
Why now

Legacy tools weren't built for this

The travel tech stack most TMCs run today was designed before NDC, before cloud-native expectations, and before the compliance bar moved. The industry has patched around the problem long enough.

Tramada

Legacy back-office built for a pre-cloud world. Configuration-heavy, slow to update, expensive to maintain.

SAP Concur

Enterprise expense tool bolted onto travel. Governance is an afterthought, not a foundation.

Serko / Zeno

Corporate booking tools focused on the booking experience, not TMC operations or mid-office control.

Crosscheck

Quality control point solution. Doesn't replace the need for a full operational platform.

Cinturon360 is the platform built for what comes next.

Modern architecture. TMC-first design. No rip-and-replace. Works alongside what you already use — and replaces what you shouldn't still be using.

See what TMCs get View integrations →

Ready to replace legacy with modern?

Cinturon360 is in active development. TMCs and design partners are joining now to shape the platform. Get early access and be first to go live.
